title: Dekton 50PCS SK5 Utility Blades with Auto Dispenser - Heavy Duty Steel, Long - Lasting Sharp Blades for Cardboard, Carpet, Leather, Paper & DIY Cutting Projects
features: Versatile Cutting Tool: Designed for a wide range of tasks, these SK5 utility blades are perfect for cutting cardboard, paper, leather, carpet, plastic, and more. They provide smooth and controlled cutting for craft projects, packaging, and general workshop use.

Convenient Auto Dispenser: Features a built-in dispenser that makes it easy to access blades quickly while keeping them neatly stored and organized. This system helps improve workflow efficiency and keeps blades protected when not in use.

High-Quality SK5 Steel: Crafted from extra-strong SK5 steel, these blades are designed for durability and consistent performance. The premium material helps maintain a sharp edge, making them suitable for repeated use in demanding cutting applications.

Long-Lasting Sharpness: The blades are engineered to stay sharp for longer, reducing the need for frequent replacements. This helps maintain smooth, precise cuts throughout your work, whether you are trimming materials for DIY projects or professional tasks.

Ideal for Multiple Settings: A practical choice for home, office, workshop, or jobsite use. Whether you are working on crafts, repairs, or packaging, these utility blades provide a reliable and convenient solution for a wide range of cutting needs.
description: The Dekton 50PCS SK5 Utility Blade Set is a practical solution for anyone who needs reliable cutting tools for home, workshop, or professional use. Each blade is crafted from durable SK5 steel, known for its strength and cutting precision, making them suitable for handling materials such as cardboard, paper, leather, carpet, and plastic. The included auto dispenser provides a convenient and safe way to access blades, keeping them neatly stored and ready for use. With their long-lasting sharpness, these blades reduce downtime by minimizing the frequency of replacements, allowing for uninterrupted work. Designed for versatility, they are ideal for DIY projects, packaging tasks, craft making, and general cutting needs. Whether for personal or professional use, this set offers an organized and efficient way to keep blades at hand for quick, clean cuts.
